MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl for and with Sharon Caron and Robert Caron. Phyllis Berenson for and with Barbara Devries. Paul Melbostadt for Patricia Picetti (Administrator).

Discussions were held with regard to: the parties not wanting an evidentiary hearing, submitting the matter on the pleadings, unpaid rents for the period of March 2011 to February 2012, the issue of child parent exclusion, the amount of the reserve needed to address property gains tax, payments of property taxes and insurance by Sharon Caron, offset of distribution, and distribution to Ronald Del Campo's Estate in Alameda County, etc. The Accounting Petition, which will include a ruling on rents and address preliminary distribution, was taken under submission. Status on filing a petition for final distribution was set for July 24, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-08-2013 Continued To May-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Nov-30-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for and with Barbara De Vries (Administrator). Nancy Lofdahl for and with Frank Caron (Creditor). Paul Melbostad for and with Patricia Picetti (Administrator of the Estate of John Picetti/Objector to Creditor Claim). David Berry (Son of Patricia) in Propria Persona. Scott Feder for and with Edward Leavitt (Real Estate Agent).

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to Mr. Caron's $85,000.00 Creditor's Claim for improvements made to the house. Mr. Leavitt was sworn in and questioned by Ms. Lofdahl and Mr. Melbostad. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Continued To Oct-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Continued To Sep-25-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for and with Barbara De Vries. Nancy Lofdahl for and with Frank Caron (Creditor). Paul Melbostad for Patricia Picetti (Administrator of the Estate of John Picetti). Sharon Caron in Propria Persona. Cheryl Picetti Fernandez in Propria Persona.

All Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to Mr. Caron's creditor's claim being approved/not approved. The Petition for Instructions was continued to September 25, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Lofdahl to file a declaration as well invoices which are to be filed by September 17, 2012. Mr. Melbostad's response is to be filed by September 21, 2012.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (531 Precita Ave., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for and with Barbara De Vries. Cheryl Fernandez (Heir) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Fernandez objected to the sale stating that she did not receive notice and that the Heirs should have the opportunity to purchase the home. The Court stated that it appears that notice has been given, and overruled the objection and proceeded with the sale. The sale was confirmed at $771,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (order for the same signed in open Court). An additional bond in the amount of $623,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1687 Alabama St., San Francisco Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Sep-07-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for and with Barbara DeVries (Administrator).

The sale was confirmed at $465,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $439,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for Barbara de Vries.

The Court stated that it had reviewed the petition and that everyone entitled to notice was served. There being no opposition, the Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Bond was set at $10,000.00.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
